PreToolUse.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm -rf /|git push.*--force.*main|drop database)' && echo 'BLOCK: 危険コマンド検出' && exit 1 || exit 0

Stop.command: npm run typecheck > /tmp/claude_typecheck.log 2>&1; tc=$?; npm run build > /tmp/claude_build.log 2>&1; bc=$?; echo '=== typecheck ==='; tail -10 /tmp/claude_typecheck.log; echo "TYPECHECK_EXIT: $tc"; echo '=== build ==='; tail -20 /tmp/claude_build.log; echo "BUILD_EXIT: $bc"; [ $tc -eq 0 ] && [ $bc -eq 0 ] || exit 1
Stop.description: タスク完了前にtypecheck+build検証（終了コードを正確に捕捉）
